entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00159) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00159 TO THE HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT, HSTS01-08-D-HRM010, IS TO: (1.) EXTEND THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE (POP) OF THE UNITARY DISPUTE RESOLUTION SYSTEM (UDRS) LEGACY DATA MIGRATION; (2.) EXTEND THE POP OF UDRS; AND (3.) UPDATE THE STATEMENT OF WORK (SOW) AND DELIVERABLE TABLE TO REFLECT TRAINING TAKING PLACE POST-DEPLOYMENT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00160) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00160 TO THE HRACCESS IDIQ CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO DEFINITIZE THE AGREEMENT REACHED BY TSA AND LOCKHEED MARTIN ON 6/11/15 TO SETTLE THE REQUEST FOR EQUITABLE ADJUSTMENT (REA) SUBMITTED ON 4/9/15 FOR COST IMPACTS RESULTING FROM THE NATIONAL FINANCE CENTER'S (NFC) IMPLEMENTATION OF AN EMPOWHR UPGRADE ON 2/10/14.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00161) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00161 TO HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO INCLUDE OPERATIONS AND MAINTENANCE (O&M) SERVICES FOR THE NEWLY DEVELOPED UNITARY DISPUTE RESOLUTION SYSTEM (UDRS) WITHIN THE CASE MANAGEMENT SYSTEM.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00162) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00162 TO THE HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT, HSTS01-08-D-HRM010, IS TO RESCIND THE UNILATERAL CHANGES CLAUSE DIRECTION ISSUED IN MODIFICATION P00157 PURSUANT TO TSA AMS CLAUSE 3.10.1-12 "CHANGES - FIXED PRICE ALTERNATE I".

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00163) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00163 TO HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO AUTHORIZE WORK TO MAKE CHANGES IN THE HIRING PATH AND TO THE FIELD ASSESSMENT BATTERY FOR FAMS G-BAND UNDER NEWLY CREATED CLIN 7009B "FAMS G-BAND."

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00164) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00164 TO THE HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO AUTHORIZE THE TRANSITION OF THE EXECUTIVE SERVICES FROM THE LOCKHEED MARTIN (LM) EXECUTIVE SERVICES OFFICE (ESO) TO THE OFFICE OF HUMAN CAPITAL (OHC) EXECUTIVE RESOURCES DIVISION (ERD). AUTHORIZED PERFORMANCE WILL BE EXECUTED UNDER CLIN SERIES 7026 "EXECUTIVE SERVICES TRANSITION," AND FUNDED UNDER TASK ORDER HSTS01-15-J-HRM098.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00165) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P000165 TO HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO UPDATE THE DESCRIPTION OF CONTRACT LINE ITEM NUMBERS (CLIN) 5030A "UDRS - TESTING AND DEPLOYMENT" AND 7021AF "UDRS O&M."

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00166 TO THE HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT, HSTS01-08-D-HRM010, IS TO EXERCISE CONTRACT LINE ITEM NUMBERS (CLINS) 7006AB "MEDICAL PROCESSING," 7015AA "SF-52&BENEFITS PROCESSING," AND 7016AA "PAYROLL ACTION PROCESSING."

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00167) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00167 TO THE HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT, HSTS01-08-D-HRM010, IS TO ADD AND EXERCISE CONTRACT LINE ITEM NUMBER (CLIN) 7005AD "BACKGROUND CHECK - E-QIP" FOR THE PERFORMANCE OF ADDITIONAL VOLUME ASSOCIATED WITH THE CHANGE IN THE E-QIP PROCESS INSTITUTING ADDITIONAL SECURITY FEATURES FOR USERS.

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00168 TO THE HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO AUTHORIZE THE TRANSITION OF AD-HOC REPORTING CURRENTLY PERFORMED UNDER CONTRACT LINE ITEM NUMBER (CLIN) SERIES X013 "REPORTING" FROM LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC. (LMIS) TO THE OFFICE OF HUMAN CAPITAL'S (OHC) HR SOLUTION CENTER DIRECTORATE.
